name: Does AI visibility work differently for local businesses in Denver or San Diego?

mainEntity.name: Does AI visibility work differently for local businesses in Denver or San Diego?

acceptedAnswer.text: For businesses serving Los Angeles, San Diego, Austin, Denver, or Salt Lake City, local relevance matters most when customers search with geographic intent. Add neighborhood, city, or service-area context only where it improves the page, not just to target a keyword.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes. Local intent matters, so pages should reflect real service areas and local context.

description: Yes. Local intent matters, so pages should reflect real service areas and local context.
